ticket.subject: Feature request: pgvector queries with metadata pre-filter that uses HNSW
ticket.body: Right now if I add a WHERE clause before an HNSW similarity search, the planner falls back to a sequential scan on the filtered subset rather than walking the index. It would be amazing if there were an opinionated pattern (or extension config) that makes pre-filter + HNSW work cleanly. Is this on any roadmap, or is the current advice 'use a generated column + partial index'?
